venues.name: The Wake
venues.description: Upscale steakhouse and seafood restaurant with 1950s glamour, a raw bar, and tableside martini service. Also serves brunch with a bottomless drinks option.

venues.name: Pink Agave
venues.description: Contemporary Mexican restaurant featuring tlayudas, ceviches, and mole alongside the largest mezcal and tequila selection at sea. Entirely gluten-free menu.

venues.name: Extra Virgin
venues.description: Italian trattoria with fresh handmade pasta, charcuterie boards, and a tableside affogato cart. Half-portions of pasta available to try multiple dishes.

venues.name: Gunbae
venues.description: Interactive Korean BBQ with flameless tabletop grills, banchan spreads, and complimentary soju to start. Features stews, seafood grill options, and Korean cocktails.

venues.name: Razzle Dazzle by Night
venues.description: Resilient Lady's evening-only comfort dining concept with vegetarian-forward dishes, indulgent desserts, and a secret off-menu burger — all in a glitzy after-dark atmosphere.

venues.name: Another Rose
venues.description: Ticketed supper club experience exclusive to Resilient Lady. Acrobatic cabaret and immersive theater by Randy Weiner woven around a multi-course dinner with paired drinks. Surcharge applies.

venues.name: The Test Kitchen
venues.description: Laboratory-styled tasting restaurant with a fixed 6-course mystery menu listing only key ingredients — dishes are a surprise. Rotates between Menu A, B, and C across voyages. Optional drink pairings available.

venues.name: The Galley
venues.description: 24-hour food hall with multiple counter-service stations: sushi, tacos, noodles, burgers, bakery, and an all-day diner. No reservations needed.

venues.name: The Pizza Place
venues.description: Beach club-inspired brick-oven pizzeria with build-your-own and signature pies. Gluten-free crust available.

venues.name: The Dock & The Dock House
venues.description: Mediterranean-inspired lounge serving small plates, mezze, dips, and flame-grilled skewers. Indoor (Dock House) and outdoor (Dock) seating with ocean views.

venues.name: Sun Club Café
venues.description: Poolside poke bowl station with chicken, tuna, or salmon bowls and vegetarian options. Quick, fresh, and casual.

venues.name: Lick Me Till Ice Cream
venues.description: House-made ice cream and gelato with 6 rotating daily flavors. Served in cone or cup; gluten-free options available.

venues.name: Grounds Club
venues.description: Coffee bar with two fleet locations. Complimentary drip coffee and tea; barista espresso drinks at extra cost. Light pastries served throughout the day.

venues.name: Sip Lounge
venues.description: Champagne-specialist lounge with premium wines and craft cocktails. Hosts afternoon tea service with sandwiches, scones, and petit fours. Tea charge applies.

venues.name: The Loose Cannon
venues.description: Brighton-inspired nautical pub with wooden tables, navy bentwood stools, casual pints, and pub grub.

venues.name: Draught Haus
venues.description: Industrial-style craft beer bar with 8 rotating taps, artisanal bottled beers, and boilermaker pairings.

venues.name: On The Rocks
venues.description: The largest bar onboard, set in the Roundabout atrium. Aged whiskies, craft cocktails, and live entertainment most evenings.

venues.name: The Social Club
venues.description: Gaming lounge serving milkshakes (spiked optional), floats, hot dogs, wings, and nachos alongside arcade games and shuffleboard.

venues.name: Gym & Tonic
venues.description: Pool-adjacent bar offering smoothies, fresh juices, frozen cocktails, and recovery beverages between the gym and the whirlpool.

venues.name: Richard's Rooftop
venues.description: Exclusive lounge for Rockstar and Mega-Rockstar Suite guests. Tom Dixon-designed space with complimentary cocktail soirées and sunset happy hours.

venues.name: Ship Eats
venues.description: In-cabin room service available 24/7. Delivery fee applies (waived with alcoholic beverage order). Covers breakfast, snacks, and late-night selections.
